description: Ion MSign lowering type confusion - Int32-input/Double-output Math.sign lowering could allocate the result in the wrong register class. The fix spans js/src/jit/Lowering.cpp, LIROps.yaml, and CodeGenerator.cpp, adding an explicit LIR/codegen path for the Int32-to-Double MSign case. Before the fix, lowering could use a general-purpose register where a floating-point result was expected, leaving stale xmm data to be interpreted as a JS::Value and producing type confusion.

fixes.description: Bug 1942648: Support MSign with Int32 input and Double
